subject: Urgent Request: Backend Engineer – Java – Telecom/media
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Backend Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Java
• AWS
• PostgreSQL

Details:
Client: FlexTel
Start: ASAP
Duration: 12 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Maja Gustafsson
Tech Talent Specialist
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 72 122 34 56
